thresholds.rationale: Initial CI floor below the first WSL2 baseline to avoid treating noisy local variance as doctrine.
Initial CI floor below the first WSL2 baseline; validation is included in the measured loop.
Initial CI floor for the public perfect-information view path.
Initial CI floor for public EffectLog filtering over the tiny Gate 1 effect set.

Variance-aware floor more than 15% below the minimum 195741.57 roundtrips/sec observed across runs 27101213584/27111487150/27114668009; native WSL2 target remains documented in BENCHMARKS.md per ADR 0005.

Variance-aware floor more than 15% below the minimum 227947.89 replays/sec observed across runs 27101213584/27111487150/27114668009; native WSL2 target remains documented in BENCHMARKS.md per ADR 0005.

ADR 0005 variance-aware floor more than 15% below the minimum 66761.40 games/sec observed across runs 27101213584/27111487150/27114668009; the ADR 0001 100000 native target remains documented in BENCHMARKS.md.

Variance-aware floor more than 15% below the minimum 1001027.56 decisions/sec observed across runs 27101213584/27111487150/27114668009; native WSL2 target remains documented in BENCHMARKS.md per ADR 0005.
